---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for ROZOOM K8s Linter IDE
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Section

Which section does this belong to?

- [ ] Workloads (Pods, Deployments, DaemonSets, etc.)
- [ ] Namespace / Configuration
- [ ] Access Control / RBAC
- [ ] Custom Resources
- [ ] Network (Services, Ingress, Policies)
- [ ] Storage (PVCs, PVs, Snapshots)
- [ ] Cluster Ops (Helm, Deprecation, Backup)
- [ ] Security & Compliance (KubeArmor, Trivy, Compliance)
- [ ] Observability (Alerts, Metrics, Pod Restarts)
- [ ] Fleet Dashboard (Cards, Linter, Scores)
- [ ] Global Triage
- [ ] Other

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's the current pain point?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, kubectl output, or references to K8s documentation.
